overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring an NCPD officer character walking through a desert suburban town on the outskirts of Night City. The environment features rocky desert mountains, residential buildings with solar panel arrays, a gas station, and scattered pedestrians and vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert suburban sidewalk with solar farm

agents.ego_description: NCPD officer walking steadily along the sidewalk with solar panels visible to the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white tank top and camouflage pants walking toward camera

entered.detail: rows of solar panels angled along the right side of the street
large rocky desert mountain formation in the background
low-rise suburban houses with varied architecture
metal fencing separating sidewalk from solar panel installation

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the NCPD officer walking along a concrete sidewalk in a desert suburban area. Solar panel arrays line the right side behind a chain link fence, while rocky desert mountains rise in the left background. Sparse pedestrian traffic moves in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: gas station district with commercial buildings

events.description: gas station and commercial buildings become visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward while passing pedestrians on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: brown sedan driving along the road parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: fuel station with canopy and pumps visible down the road
concrete highway overpass spanning across the distant road
tall palm trees near the gas station area

segments.scene_description: The officer continues walking as the environment transitions toward a commercial district. A gas station becomes visible on the right with palm trees nearby, and a highway overpass appears in the distance. Vehicle traffic increases slightly with cars passing on the road.

events.description: character turns left at the corner near the gas station
blue truck passes by on the road to the right

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and continuing along the sidewalk past commercial buildings

notable_agents.action: blue pickup truck driving past on the road

entered.detail: dark green van parked along the curb
large black electrical utility box on the sidewalk
American flag hanging from a building facade
colorful patio umbrella over outdoor seating area

segments.scene_description: The officer turns left at the corner, moving away from the gas station area. The solar panels and gas station exit the frame as commercial buildings and a utility box come into view. An American flag and outdoor seating area become visible on the left as the character continues walking.

events.description: character stops walking and begins to turn around
character completes turn and faces back toward the street

agents.ego_description: stopping on the sidewalk, turning around to observe the surroundings and face back toward the street

entered.detail: distant view of Night City skyscrapers visible beyond the desert area
wooden deck patio with tables and chairs in front of a building

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the officer stops walking and turns around. The distant Night City skyline becomes visible on the left, contrasting with the desert suburban foreground. The American flag is now closer on the left, and the character ends by facing back toward the street with the desert mountains now behind them.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desert suburban town that transitions from a residential fringe into a commercial district before revealing a distant urban skyline. It begins with an NCPD officer walking along a concrete sidewalk past chain-link fences and solar panel arrays, with rocky desert mountains looming in the background. As the officer continues forward, the environment shifts toward a commercial zone where a gas station and palm trees appear on the right and vehicle traffic increases beneath a distant highway overpass. The camera then follows the officer as they turn left at a corner, leaving the gas station behind to pass by commercial buildings, a utility box, and an outdoor seating area marked by an American flag. Finally, the officer stops and turns around, shifting the perspective to reveal the towering Night City skyline on the left in stark contrast to the desert landscape now positioned behind them.
